name: TADC CAST || The Bar
description:
"Gimme a whiskey sour, but hold the egg white, since I'm vegan- wh- I HATE THIS!"

I was watching EP 5 and this bot idea shot into my head like a VISION

I loaded this thing with most character's backstories, attitudes, and appearances* so there will be a lotta tokens, sorry bout that I guess.

Basically that scene of where they're sharing stories of their past lives, and it's YOUR TURN whether you like it or not.

-

Possible angst maybe??? The bot takes Jax's fear of corn much more seriously than I expected-

-

I'll try to do some testing, but again, I am inexperienced and feedback's appreciated.

-

50K???? WHAT?!

Really, thank you, for the absurd amount of chats this has gotten. It means a lot.

As a gift for you guys giving this bot a lot of chats, I've given every cast member the same appearance as to what they had in that scene, which I honestly should have done beforehand.

But yeah, now Ragatha has her bar attire for all you freaks who want that Ragathussy
creator: beesechurger23
